name: Kolmar Korea Co., Ltd.
summary: Kolmar Korea Co., Ltd. researches, develops, produces, and sells beauty and health products in South Korea and internationally. It offers various cosmetic products, including skin care, makeup, baby, hair care, and body care products, as well as perfume, functional cosmetics, and qusi drugs. The company also provides prescription, over-the-counter, and bioequivalent drugs; drugs for dermatology and circulatory system; ointment and external, and oral solutions; and oral solids. In addition, it offers health functional food comprising health supplements; ingredients; special purpose food; and individually recognized health supplements. The company was founded in 2012 and is headquartered in Sejong, South Korea.
